raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The establishment of the Office of Elections Cybersecurity (OEC) aims to provide state and county elections officials with the necessary information and tools to combat cyber-attacks.",
    "There are ongoing and increasingly sophisticated threats posed to election systems.",
    "Information sharing and coordination between government agencies are emphasized as important strategies in combating cybersecurity threats to elections.",
    "Developing strategies to counteract false or misleading information is crucial for maintaining voter participation and election integrity.",
    "The OEC will develop best practices for protecting election infrastructure from cyber threats.",
    "The OEC will identify resources available to state and county elections officials regarding election cybersecurity."
  ]
}
```
